extension.summary: Browse ČSFD top rankings and open in Stream Cinema
Rebríčky filmov a seriálov z ČSFD s otvorením vo Stream Cinema
Žebříčky filmů a seriálů z ČSFD s otevřením ve Stream Cinema
extension.description: Browse top movies, series and seasons from ČSFD rankings filtered by year. Each item shows rating, plot and reviews. Click any title to instantly search it in Stream Cinema.
Prehliadaj rebríčky filmov, seriálov a sérií z ČSFD s filtrom od roku. Každá položka zobrazuje hodnotenie, plot a recenzie. Kliknutím na titul sa otvorí vyhľadávanie priamo vo Stream Cinema.
Procházej žebříčky filmů, seriálů a sérií z ČSFD s filtrem od roku. Každá položka zobrazuje hodnocení, popis a recenze. Kliknutím na titul se otevře vyhledávání přímo ve Stream Cinema.

extension.summary: Stream Cinema movies and series sorted by CSFD rating
Filmy a serialy zo Stream Cinema zoradene podla CSFD
Filmy a serialy ze Stream Cinema serazene podle CSFD
extension.description: Loads new and recently added Stream Cinema movies and series, matches them against CSFD, enriches them with rating, votes, plot and reviews, then sorts the list in a CSFD-style order with cached widget results for faster home loading.

Nacita novinky a najnovsie pridane filmy a serialy zo Stream Cinema, sparuje ich s CSFD, doplni hodnotenie, hlasy, obsah a recenzie a potom ich zoradi v style CSFD. Pre home widgety pouziva vyslednu disk cache, aby sa nacitali rychlejsie.

Nacte novinky a nejnoveji pridane filmy a serialy ze Stream Cinema, sparuje je s CSFD, doplni hodnoceni, hlasy, obsah a recenze a potom je seradi ve stylu CSFD. Pro home widgety pouziva vyslednou disk cache, aby se nacitaly rychleji.
extension.news: v1.2.2 (2026-04-07) - Corrected movie widget mapping so Novinky use the original Stream Cinema latest feed and Novinky dabovane use the original latestd feed - Kept the dubbed movie feed prewarmed for skin.kolop while removing it from the addon root menu v1.2.1 (2026-04-07) - Added a dedicated dubbed movie releases source sorted through CSFD for skin.kolop home widgets - Prewarm now covers dubbed movie news so the extra row is ready sooner after Kodi startup v1.2.0 (2026-04-07) - Added Android-friendly startup prewarm and retry handling so Kolop widgets recover on cold Kodi boots - Added CSFD-based Tips of the Day sources for movies and series - Kept widget caches warm in the background through a Kodi service entry point v1.1.2 (2026-04-07) - Reduced Kolop widget fallback and detail cache retention from 3 days to 20 hours - Kept CSFD-driven home ordering while shortening stale widget lifetime v1.1.1 (2026-04-07) - Home widgets in skin.kolop now expose 25 items and keep last watched sections for SC movies and series - Switched JSON cache writes to an atomic temp-file replace flow to avoid corrupted detail/search cache files - Replaced fragile strptime date parsing so the recent-series widget works reliably on Kodi runtime v1.1.0 (2026-04-07) - Added movie and series sources for new and recently added Stream Cinema content - Added cached widget payloads for faster home loading - Added dedicated skin.kolop integration and improved metadata for repository publishing v1.0.1 (2026-04-06) - Switched CSFD requests to a safer header strategy that avoids the current anti-bot challenge in normal flow - Removed shared HTTP session usage across worker threads - Serialized cache updates for parallel CSFD search/detail enrichment

extension.description: CS kodi repo - ČSFD Rebríček a Titulky DualSub
CS kodi repo - ČSFD Rankings and Titulky DualSub

extension.summary: Translate CZ/SK subtitles and queue remote OpenSubtitles upload
extension.description: Finds nearby subtitle files, reuses cached Ukrainian translations from a remote helper when available, otherwise translates them with the DeepL API, produces bilingual ASS subtitles, and can queue the Ukrainian upload on a remote helper such as LibreELEC on Raspberry Pi.
extension.news: v0.1.3 - Restore the classic Kodi add-on settings format for LibreELEC compatibility - Keep existing stored add-on settings readable without migration - Preserve cached helper lookup and remote upload helper configuration

extension.summary: Create Czech/Slovak plus Ukrainian bilingual subtitles with DeepL
extension.description: Finds nearby or currently loaded subtitle files, sends their subtitle text to the DeepL API, writes a bilingual subtitle file that keeps the original lines and adds Ukrainian translations underneath, then returns it through Kodi's subtitle search flow.

extension.summary: Translate CZ/SK subtitles to Ukrainian with DeepL and upload to OpenSubtitles
extension.description: Finds nearby subtitle files, translates them to Ukrainian using DeepL API, produces bilingual ASS subtitles (original top + Ukrainian bottom), and optionally uploads the Ukrainian translation to OpenSubtitles.org via browser automation.

extension.summary: Search and download dual subtitles from OpenSubtitles.com, Titulky.com, and TVsubtitles.net simultaneously
Vyhľadávanie a sťahovanie duálnych titulkov z OpenSubtitles.com, Titulky.com a TVsubtitles.net súčasne
Hledání a stahování duálních titulků z OpenSubtitles.com, Titulky.com a TVsubtitles.net současně
extension.description: Combines OpenSubtitles.com, Titulky.com and TVsubtitles.net into a single dual-subtitle addon. Searches all sources in parallel. Select two subtitles — first selected appears at the TOP (white), second at the BOTTOM (yellow). Supports Ukrainian, English, and 40+ languages. TVsubtitles.net is searched automatically for TV shows (Ukrainian, English and others — not Czech/Slovak). Requires OpenSubtitles.com and/or Titulky.com credentials in addon settings.

Kombinuje zdroje titulkov OpenSubtitles.com, Titulky.com a TVsubtitles.net do jedného duálneho addonu. Vyhľadáva všetky zdroje paralelne. Vyber dva titulky — prvý vybraný ide HORE (biele), druhý vybraný ide DOLE (žlté). TVsubtitles.net sa prehľadáva automaticky pre seriály (ukrajinčina, angličtina a ďalšie — nie čeština/slovenčina).

extension.summary: Download Czech or Slovak subtitles and auto-build a Ukrainian phonetic dual subtitle
extension.description: Downloads Czech or Slovak subtitles from OpenSubtitles.com or Titulky.com. After selecting one subtitle, the add-on generates a Ukrainian phonetic version locally and merges both into one dual subtitle file with one line on top and one on bottom.
extension.disclaimer: Requires configured provider accounts for the subtitle source you use.
extension.news: v1.6.6 (2026-04-03) - Added a separate Slovak style switch: Simple (recommended) or Precise - Simple Slovak mode now favors faster reading in Cyrillic over narrower phonetic detail v1.6.5 (2026-04-03) - Split phonetic rewriting into clearer Czech and Slovak profiles - Auto mode now locks one profile for the whole subtitle instead of mixing by word v1.6.4 (2026-04-03) - Improved Czech and Slovak phonetic rewrite rules using updated practical-transcription research - Better handling for Czech ě, Slovak ia/ie/iu, soft consonants, and Ji- forms v1.6.3 (2026-04-01) - Swapped subtitle lanes so Czech or Slovak is shown on top and Ukrainian phonetic on bottom v1.6.2 (2026-03-31) - Repackaged build after Raspberry Pi search-speed improvements v1.6.1 (2026-03-31) - Added fast search mode for slower devices such as Raspberry Pi - Added shorter network timeouts and stopped waiting on slow providers - Reused cached file metadata and skipped remote movie hashing in fast mode v1.6.0 (2026-03-31) - Cleaned the standalone addon down to a single search-download-rewrite-merge flow - Removed legacy multi-select and TVSubtitles leftovers - One selected Czech or Slovak subtitle now downloads, generates phonetic Ukrainian, and merges automatically

extension.summary: Dedicated Kolop skin with fast home widgets
Samostatny Kolop skin s rychlymi home widgetmi
Samostatny Kolop skin s rychlymi home widgety
extension.description: A dedicated Kodi skin for Kolop focused on fast startup, lazy home widgets, and CSFD-sorted movies and series.
Samostatny Kodi skin pre Kolop zamerany na rychly start, lazy home widgety a filmy so serialmi zoradenymi podla CSFD.
Samostatny Kodi skin pro Kolop zamereny na rychly start, lazy home widgety a filmy se serialy serazenymi podle CSFD.
extension.news: v1.1.4 (2026-04-07) - SC Filmy now keeps Novinky dabovane directly under Posledne sledovane and reads them from the original Stream Cinema category source - Removed the extra dubbed shortcut from the Kolop search dialog and kept the home rows aligned with the original SC sections v1.1.3 (2026-04-07) - Added a dedicated dubbed new releases row to SC Filmy using the Kolop CSFD-sorted source - Added matching labels and info-widget support for the new dubbed movie row v1.1.2 (2026-04-07) - Enabled media item ratings by default on first start - Increased the Kolop home plot area so longer descriptions fit v1.1.1 (2026-04-07) - Trimmed the custom SC home back so only Kategorie stays above the original Kolop rows - Removed the extra added home sections that were not requested v1.1.0 (2026-04-07) - Restored a wider Estuary Mod style home widget stack for SC movies and series - Added localized Kolop home labels and Czech-ready strings for the custom skin sections - Wired the new Kolop Tips of the Day widgets into home and info panels v1.0.3 (2026-04-07) - Read CSFD ratings explicitly via ListItem.Rating(csfd) and ListItem.Votes(csfd) in the home info widget - Show rating source as csfd.cz in the CSFD home info panel v1.0.2 (2026-04-07) - Moved the CSFD section to the end of the home menu - Added rating type display to the CSFD home info panel v1.0.1 (2026-04-07) - Restored home sections to CSFD, SC Filmy, SC Serialy and kept Doplnky visible by default - Added back last watched widgets for SC movies and series - Increased Kolop home widget limits to 25 items and kept CSFD integration on home/search
extension.license: CC BY-SA 4.0, GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE Version 2.0
